steps.t: The shade of Isildur is by the waggon bearing his bones northward, in Laerlad.
Gandalf is by the waggon bearing the bones of Isildur northward, in Laerlad.
Gandalf suggested you catch up with the waggon bearing the bones of Isildur when it arrives at the entrance to the valley of Rivendell.
The shade of Isildur has at last finished the journey he swore in life to undertake more than three thousand years ago.
Gandalf is by the waggon bearing Isildur's bones to Rivendell, by the entrance to that secret valley.
Gandalf is by the waggon bearing Isildur's bones to Rivendell, by the entrance to that secret valley.
